meaning: n.统计量adj.统计的,统计学的
examples: I felt I was no longer being treated as a person but as a statistic.
The statistic figures in the report are not accurate. You should not refer to them.
The most important statistic of the day, however, was the $100,000,000 in TV advertising fees.
You can find a statistic or study to support nearly every wacky theory out there.
Now, mind you, this is all a rough estimate and this statistic is very, very noisy.
